series_metadata.series_title: Payroll Warrant Records and Payroll Disbursement Records
series_metadata.series_description: Documents created for the disbursements of payroll warrants, checks, reports, and journals providing a breakdown of employee pay and hours worked collectively and individually.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Paper: audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved
